steps.title: Match the student's goal
steps.content: The sentence must present both the study and its methodology. That means it should identify what Lin was trying to understand and also state how the study was conducted: by using computer simulations to study the mother duck's wake.

steps.title: Rule out findings-only choices
steps.content: A and D report results from the study, such as reduced drag or forward movement, without naming the method. C gives a vague description of the physics but still does not say how Lin investigated it. The choice that gives both the study's purpose and the simulation method fits the student's goal. The answer is B.
